name: @finnes/indexer
description: Stateful indexer + HTTP API for Finnes (FIN-029). Persists the commitment tree from genesis so any client gets a correct inclusion path + an in-window anchor root (root-cause fix for UnknownAnchorRoot #10). PUBLIC data only (invariant #8); the on-chain Groth16 proof is the integrity guarantee, so the indexer is UNTRUSTED.
